title: Product surfaces have distinct responsibilities and must not collapse into one funnel

claims.statement: The Vercel surface is an active interactive Mirror Cartographer experience and must not contain payment or conversion logic.
The Cloudflare research surface owns research, theory, science, medicine-facing organization, deployment, and conversion architecture, while deployment remains externally blocked.
The independent creative site must preserve an identity unrelated to Mirror Cartographer and must not become another explanation page or product funnel.
These boundaries define a three-surface architecture: experience on Vercel, evidence/research/value routing on Cloudflare, and autonomous art on the independent host.
The exact public handoff between the Vercel experience and Cloudflare research surface is not yet evidenced by a deployed, resolving Cloudflare URL.

contradictions_resolved.apparent_conflict: Both Vercel Studio and Cloudflare Research may discuss user value and public presentation.
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Presentation is shared, but conversion ownership is not: Vercel remains non-commercial and experiential; Cloudflare may own conversion architecture after its deployment is proven.

proposed_followup: Define and test a non-commercial, privacy-safe outbound handoff contract from Vercel to the verified Cloudflare research URL after C-001 is resolved.
falsification_or_review_route: Re-read the cited blobs. Mark individual claims superseded rather than deleting this record if surface ownership or hard boundaries change. CM-0009-E may be resolved only by retained Cloudflare deployment evidence with a resolving URL and immutable served commit.
